name: Bridge Creek Heavenly Hots
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour, baking soda, salt and sugar until well blended.
2. In another bowl, mix together the eggs and sour cream until well blended. Add to the dry ingredients and mix until all dry ingredients are mixed in. Allow the mixture to sit for about 5 minutes.
3. Heat a large frying pan. Once hot, add a little oil and lightly coat the bottom of the skillet.
4. Using a tablespoon, drop the batter onto the hot skillet. Cook on one side until the bubbles on the top start to pop and the edges begin to look dry.
5. Carefully flip them so they don't burn. They puff up when flipped.
